pull_request.title: fix: verified bugs batch 3 — SWIG int helper, failsafe_f0 return code
pull_request.body:
## Summary

- Add `inta_to_voidp` helper to SWIG bindings so `intArray` can be passed as `void *argv` to functions like `xtract_subbands` that cast argv to `int *`
- Fix `xtract_failsafe_f0` to return `XTRACT_NO_RESULT` (with `*result = 0.0`) when both `xtract_f0` and the spectrum-based fallback fail to detect pitch; add malloc NULL checks

## Issues fixed

Fixes #67
Fixes #55

## Test plan

- [x] `make && make check` passes (347 assertions, 60 test cases)
- [ ] Verify `xtract_subbands` works from Python using `intArray` + `inta_to_voidp`
- [ ] Verify `xtract_failsafe_f0` returns `XTRACT_NO_RESULT` for silence/noise input

commit_summaries.message:
fix: add inta_to_voidp helper for int array arguments in SWIG

xtract_subbands casts void *argv to int *, but SWIG bindings only
exposed doublea_to_voidp. Passing doubles reinterpreted as ints
gives garbage values and segfaults. Add inta_to_voidp so callers
can pass intArray arguments correctly via the existing intArray
class.

Fixes #67

fix: return XTRACT_NO_RESULT from failsafe_f0 when fallback fails

Previously always returned XTRACT_SUCCESS even when both xtract_f0
and the spectrum-based fallback found no pitch. When the fallback
fails, set *result to 0.0 and return XTRACT_NO_RESULT. Also add
NULL checks on malloc and use calloc for zero-initialised buffers.

Fixes #55
